reason: Modifying sssd.conf to add certmap sections directly impacts authentication and identity mapping. A syntax error or incorrect mapping can break SSSD, causing loss of LDAP/AD authentication and potentially locking out SSH or sudo access. Because of this clear risk to critical authentication services, human review is required before applying the change.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; potential authentication failure; possible SSH login lockout; service disruption for SSSD
